full_description:
If you’re looking for a high-level AI project that combines Digital Marketing + Stock/Share Market Analysis, here are some strong portfolio and business ideas:

1. AI Marketing & Stock Intelligence Platform

Overview

An AI platform that helps businesses and investors make decisions using marketing data, news, social media sentiment, and stock market trends.

Features

* AI-powered market sentiment analysis
* Social media monitoring
* Competitor analysis
* Stock prediction dashboard
* News impact analysis
* Marketing campaign recommendations
* Lead generation insights
* Real-time alerts

AI Technologies

* NLP
* Sentiment Analysis
* LLMs
* Time Series Forecasting
* Predictive Analytics

Tech Stack

* Python
* FastAPI
* React
* PostgreSQL
* OpenAI API
* TensorFlow
* LangChain

⸻

2. AI Digital Marketing Automation Suite

Features

* AI content generation
* SEO optimization
* Ad copy generation
* Campaign performance prediction
* Audience targeting
* Email marketing automation
* Competitor tracking

Business Value

Useful for:

* Agencies
* Freelancers
* Startups
* E-commerce brands

⸻

3. AI Stock Market Advisor

Features

* Technical indicator analysis
* Stock screening
* Portfolio optimization
* Risk assessment
* Buy/Sell recommendations
* AI chatbot for investors
* News sentiment tracking

Advanced Features

* Candlestick pattern recognition
* Portfolio health score
* Earnings report analysis

⸻

4. AI Influencer & Brand Intelligence System

Features

* Influencer discovery
* Fake follower detection
* Engagement prediction
* Brand sentiment monitoring
* ROI forecasting
* Competitor influencer tracking

Ideal for digital marketing agencies.

⸻

5. Ultimate AI Business Growth Platform (Best Portfolio Project)

Combines:

* Digital Marketing AI
* SEO AI
* Social Media AI
* Stock Market AI
* Business Analytics AI
* Sales Forecasting AI

Modules

1. Marketing Dashboard
2. SEO Analyzer
3. Ad Campaign Optimizer
4. Social Listening Tool
5. Stock Market Analyzer
6. Financial News Analyzer
7. AI Chat Assistant
8. Business Forecast Engine

Monetization

* SaaS subscription
* Agency licenses
* Enterprise plans
* Investor analytics subscriptions

Why This Project?

* High demand in freelancing
* Suitable for internships
* Startup-ready idea
* Strong AI portfolio project
* Can be showcased on GitHub and LinkedIn

For a freelancer or job seeker, I would recommend building “AI Marketing & Stock Intelligence Platform” first because it demonstrates skills in AI, data analytics, finance, dashboards, APIs, automation, and business intelligence in a single project.

full_description:
I’m refreshing my home and need a full interior concept rendered in both 2-D plans and 3-D visuals. The project covers three key areas—living room, bedroom, and kitchen—within a residential setting. I’m after a distinctly European style: clean lines, refined detailing, and a balanced mix of comfort and elegance.

Here’s what I would like to receive: 
• Scaled 2-D floor plans that show furniture placement, lighting points, and clear circulation paths 
• Photorealistic 3-D renders (day and night scenes) that capture materials, colors, and ambience 
• A concise mood board with reference images, color palette, and material samples 
• A specification sheet listing furniture, fixtures, and finishes, along with sourcing links or product codes 
• Editable source files (AutoCAD / Revit for plans, SketchUp / 3ds Max + V-Ray or equivalent for renders) so I can make future tweaks if needed 

Accuracy is essential: dimensions must match supplied measurements, and the 3-D images should faithfully reflect the 2-D layouts. If you work in another comparable toolset, let me know—flexibility is fine as long as the final output meets these criteria.

Once I share the existing plans and photos, you can start with an initial concept; after one feedback round we’ll move to final renders and documentation. Let’s create a cohesive European-inspired home that feels both timeless and inviting.

I need a results-driven partner to take full ownership of SEO for propertyfinder.ae. The first milestone is a comprehensive audit that benchmarks our current performance and maps out every area that needs improvement across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO.

On-page priorities 
• Refresh and expand page copy so it targets the right real-estate keywords without sounding stuffed. 
• Rework meta titles, descriptions, and headers to raise click-through rates. 
• Tighten our internal linking so authority flows naturally to high-value listings and landing pages.

Off-page and authority building 
• Secure high-quality backlinks from reputable real-estate, finance, and regional outlets. 
• Pitch and place guest posts that position us as market thought-leaders. 
• Support each new link or article with coordinated social media pushes to amplify reach.

Technical essentials 
• Crawl the entire site, flag indexation issues, and improve page-load speed. 
• Ensure structured data, XML sitemaps, and Core Web Vitals are fully optimised. 
• Deliver a clean reporting dashboard so I can track fixes and their impact.

Acceptance criteria 
1. Audit document highlighting issues, opportunities, and a 3-month action plan. 
2. Implementation of agreed on-page, off-page, and technical tasks with before/after evidence. 
3. Monthly performance report covering rankings, traffic, and conversion movement.

If you have a proven track record in real-estate SEO and can couple strategic insight with hands-on execution, let’s discuss timelines and get started.

full_description:
I’d like a compact yet polished website built entirely in Framer. The site will consist of three distinct sections:

• Intro / Landing: a clean, modern hero area that quickly explains who we are and sets the tone. Animation or subtle motion is fine as long as it stays fast and lightweight. 
• Product Showcase: highlights our best-selling items with room for a short description, price or CTA button beneath each image. Please set this up so I can swap products or reorder cards without touching code. 
• Inquiries & Team: head-shots, brief bios and tightly curated contact details for each employee, plus a simple contact form that routes to the correct address.

Visual direction 
– Overall style: modern and sleek, no clutter. 
– Palette: blues and grays are the primary colors; use white space generously. 
– Typography: web-safe, clean, and readable on mobile.

Technical guidelines 
– Build natively in Framer so I can edit copy and images myself. 
– Optimized for desktop, tablet, and mobile. 
– Please apply best practices for accessibility (contrast, alt text, logical tab order). 
– Deliver in a hand-off state: share link plus project file, and walk me through any custom interactions you add.

Acceptance 
The project is complete when the live Framer link matches the design brief above, loads quickly on mobile, and I can update text, images, and product cards without additional coding.

I need a quote for everything above including maintenance costs. Please also provide a retainer cost for you to manage everything maintenance wise per month or per year.

I have a batch of personal-vlog clips that need to be shaped into a polished story. The raw footage is already organised chronologically; what I need now is advanced editing— tasteful effects, smooth transitions, colour correction and balanced audio—so the final product feels clean and professional rather than flashy or chaotic. 

You can work in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro or DaVinci Resolve; whichever lets you maintain high-quality exports while keeping the project files easy for me to revisit later. • One fully edited video (1080p or 4K, depending on the original footage) ready for YouTube and Instagram. 
• All project files and assets neatly packaged so I can tweak or repurpose clips in the future. 
• Up to two rounds of revisions to ensure the pacing, look and feel match the clean, professional style I’m after. 

Let me know your expected turnaround and any recent vlog pieces that show your command of advanced effects used with restraint.

full_description:
I need a concise, scroll-stopping video that introduces my product and sparks genuine customer engagement on social platforms specially facebook insta and tikto. The clip can be a short ad, reel, or story—whichever format you feel will best keep viewers watching to the end and wanting to buy the product. 

What absolutely must come through in the storytelling is how effortlessly the product works, the distinctive features that set it apart, and the clear cost-saving advantage it offers. If you can weave those points in naturally while keeping the pace lively, we’re on the same page.

I’m open to any creative approach—animated sequences, live-action footage, mixed media, playful motion graphics—so long as the final result feels fresh and engaging. Feel free to recommend shots, a quick script, voice-over, captions, on-screen text, or background music if it helps the story land. Tools such as Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut, or similar are fine; use what lets you deliver crisp visuals and smooth edits.

Deliverables 
• One polished video ready for upload (MP4 or MOV) 
• Length tailored for social feeds (reel/story/ad) 
• Versions in both vertical and horizontal aspect ratios 
• All source files so I can make future tweaks if needed 

If you can show a couple of previous pieces that drove strong viewer interaction, that will help me move quickly on awarding the project. Let me know your timeline and any questions you might have—I’m eager to get this rolling.

full_description:
I run an entertainment-focused YouTube channel that’s edging closer to the monetization threshold, and I’m ready to accelerate subscriber growth. So far I’ve leaned on social-media promos, cross-channel collabs, and the occasional paid ad, but I need a sharper, data-driven push that converts casual viewers into loyal followers and gets the channel earning.

Here’s what I’m looking for:

• A clear growth roadmap tailored to entertainment content—audience research, topic clustering, SEO-friendly titles, thumbnails, and posting cadence that fit my brand’s voice. 
• Implementation support: optimizing existing videos, setting up end screens, cards, playlists, and community posts; refining ad campaigns where they make sense. 
• Metrics tracking with YouTube Analytics and, if helpful, tools like TubeBuddy or VidIQ so we can measure watch time, CTR, and, most importantly, net new subscribers.

I’m open to creative experiments—shorts, giveaways, live-stream events—provided they stay compliant with YouTube’s policies and bring real, organic subscribers, not bots. At the end of each milestone I’ll need a concise report showing tactics used and the subscriber gains tied to them.

If you’ve helped other channels in the entertainment niche reach the monetization benchmark, let’s talk strategy and timelines.

full_description:
I am ready to move a lean logistics ERP from concept to an MVP that we can put in users’ hands within 2–3 weeks. My stack is fixed—FlutterFlow for the multiplatform UI, Firebase for auth + data, and Google Sheets as the quick-and-dirty reporting layer—so you’ll need to be fully comfortable in that toolkit.

Scope 
The first release must run smoothly on Web, iOS, and Android and support three roles: Admin, Driver, and Client. Core screens and workflows are already sketched; your job is to wire them up, polish the UX, and be sure the following functions work end-to-end:

• Vehicle search by plate or fleet number 
• WhatsApp alerts fired automatically at each status change 
• One-click driver tracking link, live on mobile 
• Daily dispatch report generated from trip data 
• Plant-wise, buyer-wise, and seller-wise pending reports 
• Auto-generated PDF loading sheets 
• Excel export of all key tables 
• KPI dashboard showing Pending, Completed, and Delayed vehicles at a glance

Acceptance 
1. All features above demonstrated on Web, iOS, and Android simulators. 
2. Role-based access enforced (Admin full control, Driver limited to assigned loads, Client read-only on their orders). 
3. Data persisted in Firebase, sheets synced. 
4. Clean, commented FlutterFlow project handed over with build instructions.

If you have shipped production apps with this exact trio—FlutterFlow, Firebase, Google Sheets—let’s talk and lock a timeline.

full_description:
Our parcel-locker kiosks run on a Windows fat-client with a touchscreen front-end that talks to a Windows .NET service. That service now needs a native C++ DLL that can in turn drive the locker control board, which is built around an STM32 microcontroller.

What the DLL must do 
• Accept a compartment number and trigger the STM32 board to unlock/open that door. 
• Query the board to confirm whether a specific compartment door is currently open or closed. 

Technical expectations 
The library should expose a small, clean C-style API so it can be P/Invoked from the existing .NET service. Please write it in modern C++ (Visual Studio tool-chain) and make the calls non-blocking and thread-safe. Any board communication (currently handled over the board’s existing serial link) should be abstracted so the service never has to deal with low-level protocol details.

Deliverables 
1. Compiled 64-bit DLL and matching import library 
2. Header file with function prototypes and brief inline docs 
3. Short developer guide (PDF or markdown) explaining build steps, deployment, and sample C# usage 
4. Source code, ready to build under Visual Studio, with clear comments

Acceptance

full_description:
Project Title: CRM 360 (Customer Relationship Management System)
My project is a modern, full-stack CRM dashboard application designed to manage business operations, client relationships, and team productivity. It combines a dynamic React-based frontend with a FastAPI-driven backend to create a professional management environment.

Core Modules & Functionality
Customer Management:

CRUD Operations: You have built a functional interface to Create, Read, Update, and Delete customer records.

RBAC (Role-Based Access Control): The UI intelligently restricts sensitive actions (Edit/Delete) based on the user's role (Admin, Manager, or Employee), ensuring secure data management.

Dynamic Categorization: Customers are tagged as "Standard," "VIP," or "Corporate," allowing for segmented business operations.

Executive Dashboard:

Live Analytics: It acts as the central command center, providing a high-level overview of business health via key metrics:

Customer Growth: Total active client count.

Lead Pipeline: Tracking active sales leads.

Performance Tracking: Calculating conversion rates to measure business efficiency.

Task Management: Tracking pending operational tasks.

User Experience (UX) & Design:

Dual-Theme Engine: A fully integrated Light/Dark mode system that syncs with localStorage to ensure a consistent look across sessions.

Responsive Layout: A modular interface designed to handle different screen sizes while maintaining a clean, professional aesthetic.

Modern UI Components: You are using stylized cards, badges, and organized grid layouts to present dense data in a scannable and digestible format.

Technical Stack
Frontend: React.js, Vite, and CSS-in-JS (inline styles) for a modular UI.

Backend: FastAPI (Python), providing a robust REST API layer for data handling.

Database: SQLite (via [login to view URL]), providing a lightweight and efficient local storage solution.

Persistence: Uses localStorage to bridge the gap between sessions for theme preferences and client-side cached data.

Project Vision
The project is clearly intended for operational efficiency. It automates the tracking of clients and tasks, reducing the administrative burden on a business. It is a "dashboard-first" application, prioritizing visual clarity and quick access to actionable business intelligence.

full_description:
# Hiring: Book Marketing & Author Brand Growth Manager

**Location:** Remote – India
**Engagement:** Initial 90-Day Contract, Extendable
**Book Category:** * Business Book *

We are looking for a creative, commercially focused and execution-driven **Book Marketing & Author Brand Growth Manager** to promote the business book and build the author’s digital presence.

## About the Book

*This Book* is a field-tested operator’s guide to cross-border electronics trading.

The book covers real-world subjects including international trade, supplier management, compliance, currency exposure, cash flow, thin margins, counterfeit risk, taxation, logistics and business survivability.

Its target readers include:

* Importers, exporters and international traders
* Mobile phone and electronics industry professionals
* Entrepreneurs and SME owners
* Supply-chain and logistics professionals
* Business consultants and advisors
* Management students and aspiring global entrepreneurs

## Key Responsibilities

### Social Media and Content

* Develop and execute a 90-day book-promotion strategy.
* Manage content for LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook and YouTube.
* Convert chapters, stories and lessons from the book into engaging posts, carousels, Reels and YouTube Shorts.
* Create a monthly content calendar.
* Support the author in recording videos remotely.
* Edit short-form videos with captions, hooks and suitable visual elements.
* Build the author’s positioning as an experienced cross-border trade operator and industry thought leader.

### Book Sales and Amazon Optimisation

* Review and improve the Amazon book description, keywords, categories, Author Central profile and A+ Content.
* Create campaigns that direct relevant readers to the book’s Amazon page.
* Track book sales before and after campaigns.
* Recommend and manage Amazon or social media advertising, subject to prior approval.
* Develop partnerships with business communities, colleges, trade groups and professional associations.

### Reviews and Reader Outreach

* Identify relevant book reviewers, bloggers, entrepreneurs, traders, business leaders and industry professionals.
* Coordinate complimentary review copies for genuine and independent consideration.
* Follow up professionally without influencing or dictating the reviewer’s opinion.
* Build a database of reviewers and potential book advocates.
* Encourage genuine readers to share honest feedback after reading the book.


### SEO, Articles and PR

* Research relevant keywords connected with cross-border trade, electronics trading, business survivability, international expansion, compliance and entrepreneurship.
* Write and publish high-quality SEO articles based on the book’s subjects.
* Identify suitable business websites, trade publications, LinkedIn newsletters and media platforms.
* Pitch the author for podcasts, interviews, guest articles, panel discussions and business events.
* Prepare press releases, media pitches and author profiles.
* Build genuine, relevant backlinks through editorial coverage and valuable content—not bulk directory submissions.

### Analytics and Reporting

* Submit a weekly activity report.
* Provide a monthly report covering:

 * Content published
 * Reach and engagement
 * Website and Amazon traffic
 * Reader enquiries and email leads
 * Review outreach
 * Media and podcast approaches
 * PR coverage
 * Advertising expenditure
 * Book sales attributable to campaigns
* Recommend improvements based on actual performance data.

## Monthly Deliverables

The expected monthly output will normally include:

* 15–16 social media posts and carousels
* 8–12 Reels or YouTube Shorts
* 1–2 long-form videos or author interviews
* 2–4 original SEO articles
* 40–60 targeted PR, podcast, reviewer or influencer approaches
* One email or reader-community campaign
* Weekly reporting and one monthly strategy review

## Candidate Requirements

* Minimum 2–4 years of experience in digital marketing, content marketing, book promotion, author branding or personal-brand marketing.
* Strong written and spoken English.
* Ability to write intelligent business content rather than generic promotional captions.
* Experience with LinkedIn, Instagram and YouTube content.
* Working knowledge of Canva and video-editing tools such as CapCut, Premiere Pro or similar.
* Basic understanding of SEO, keyword research, Google Analytics and Search Console.
* Experience with media pitching, podcast outreach or influencer collaborations.
* Ability to work independently and deliver according to agreed deadlines.
* Strong understanding of analytics, campaign performance and sales conversion.

Experience promoting books, courses, consultants, business leaders or professional-service brands will be strongly preferred.

## Compensation

* Monthly fixed compensation based on experience.
* Additional performance incentives based on agreed and measurable results.
* Initial engagement will be for 90 days and may be extended based on performance.

Advertising, book copies, approved influencer fees and paid media expenses will be funded separately.

## How to Apply

Please send:

1. Your CV or professional profile.
2. Links to social media accounts or brands you have managed.
3. Samples of posts, articles, Reels and videos created by you.
4. Examples of book, author, course or personal-brand campaigns you have handled.
5. Screenshots or evidence of campaign results.
6. Your expected monthly compensation.
7. A brief 90-day proposal explaining how you would promote 
8. Three sample content ideas for the book.
9. Five podcasts, publications, communities or influencers you would initially approach.

Please do not apply with a generic proposal. Applications demonstrating an understanding of the book and its target readers will be given preference.

full_description:
Project: Marketing content for "Eclipped" — an app that auto-clips the best
moments from top Kick streamers in real time ([login to view URL]). Audience: TikTok
clippers and viewers who love streamer/clip content.

I need TWO things:

1) ONE app showcase video (vertical 9:16, ~20–35s)
 - Shows what the app does: browse the live clip feed, see the best moments
 auto-detected, download a ready-to-post clip. Make it feel fast and "wow".
 - Strong hook in the first 2 seconds (e.g. "POV: you never have to scrub a
 VOD again"). Punchy, benefit-led.
 - I'll give you screen recordings + a login so you can record/understand it.

2) FIVE TikTok-style clip videos (vertical 9:16) from my clips
 - Take the raw Kick clips I provide and edit them into scroll-stopping
 TikToks: hook, animated captions, clean crop, light Eclipped branding.
 - These are entertainment-first (the clip is the star); branding subtle.

STYLE (important):
- NO AI voiceover and no narration — caption-driven, using trending/popular
 audio. (AI voices look cheap; avoid them.)
- Bold animated word-by-word captions, fast pacing, hook on screen instantly.
- Brand: coral #ff3b5c, logo provided, handle @eclippedclips, tagline
 "No filler. Just the moment."

DELIVERABLES:
- 6 final videos total (1 showcase + 5 clips), 1080x1920 MP4, no watermark.
- Editable project files if possible.

Please share 2–3 examples of short-form/app-promo work you've done. Timeline
and number of revisions?

full_description:
I want a printable 3D model of a replacement housing for my current Mini Cooper key fob. I will be keeping the original internal electronics, so the cavity must match the existing board and battery exactly—no changes there, just a better shell around it. 

The look should echo the Classic Mini Cooper style rather than anything too modern or futuristic. I’ll be printing in PLA on a standard FDM printer, so please keep wall thicknesses, tolerances, and overhangs suited to that material and process.

Essential details to include: 
• the Mini Cooper logo or emblem on the front face, 
• a sturdy key-ring attachment point, 
• proper cut-outs with clear raised or recessed labeling for the existing buttons, plus a small sprue of separate printable “spare” buttons I can pop in if one goes missing. 

Deliverables: the finished CAD file (STEP or native SolidWorks/Fusion 360) and a ready-to-print STL. I’ll consider the job complete once the model drops cleanly into my slicer, prints without unsupported surprises, and the electronics click in place with a snug, non-rattling fit.

full_description:
I run a YouTube channel that explores food and health from a warm, human angle, and I’m looking for a writer who can turn the latest trends in nutrition, ingredients, and wellness into captivating stories that resonate with viewers of all ages. Every script should balance solid facts with an engaging narrative arc—think clear hooks, relatable examples, smooth scene transitions, and a concise takeaway that encourages the audience to act or reflect.

Here’s what I’m after: 
• Trend-driven topics (new super-foods, viral health challenges, innovative cooking methods, etc.) backed by credible sources. 
• A conversational tone that feels inclusive to children, teens, adults, and seniors alike. 
• Natural storytelling devices—dialogue, character moments, or brief case studies—that add a genuine human touch without drifting into pure anecdote or lengthy history lessons. 
• Script length, formatting, and on-screen cue suggestions delivered in a ready-to-record Google Doc or Word file.

For your proposal, walk me through exactly how you’ll research, outline, and write a single episode from idea to polished draft. Break down milestones, research methods, and revision cycles so I can see your full process at a glance. Links to past scripts or channels you have written for are welcome, but a detailed project plan is essential.

If blending accuracy with heart and trend awareness sounds like your specialty, I’d love to read your proposal and start shaping the next story together.

full_description:
Sales Dashboard Project – Detailed Description

This project involved creating a comprehensive Sales Dashboard in Microsoft Excel from raw sales data. The objective was to transform unstructured sales records into meaningful business insights through data cleaning, analysis, and visualization.

Project Overview

The raw dataset contained sales transactions with information such as Order ID, Customer Name, Product Category, Product Name, Region, Sales Representative, Quantity Sold, Unit Price, Sales Amount, and Order Date. Before analysis, the data was cleaned and prepared to ensure accuracy and consistency.

Data Cleaning Process
Removed duplicate records to avoid inaccurate results.
Checked and corrected data formatting issues.
Handled missing and blank values where necessary.
Standardized text entries for consistency.
Verified numerical fields such as sales amounts and quantities.
Organized the dataset into a structured format suitable for analysis.
Data Analysis

After cleaning the data, Pivot Tables were used to analyze sales performance from different perspectives:

Total Sales generated.
Total Number of Orders.
Average Sales per Order.
Sales Performance by Region.
Sales Performance by Product Category.
Top Performing Products.
Sales Representative Performance.
Monthly Sales Trends.
Dashboard Creation

An interactive dashboard was developed using:

Pivot Tables
Pivot Charts
KPI Cards
Slicers for dynamic filtering

The dashboard allows users to quickly explore sales data and identify trends by selecting different regions, products, or sales representatives.

Key Insights Generated
Best-performing regions based on revenue.
Highest-selling products and categories.
Monthly sales growth trends.
Top-performing sales representatives.
Overall business sales performance.
Skills Applied
Microsoft Excel
Data Cleaning
Data Validation
Pivot Tables
Pivot Charts
Dashboard Design
KPI Reporting
Business Data Analysis
Outcome

The final dashboard converted raw sales data into a professional, easy-to-understand reporting tool that helps businesses monitor performance, identify growth opportunities, and support data-driven decision-making. This project demonstrates practical Excel skills in data cleaning, analysis, and dashboard development.

Xenon Consulting partners with fast-growing manufacturers that want to move from ad-hoc practices to data-driven discipline. Right now the single, most urgent piece is an ML model that turns raw video streams from the shop floor into actionable insights. By integrating this AI layer we intend to optimise day-to-day operations and give plant managers the evidence they need to tighten quality, safety and throughput.

Here is what the engagement covers: 
• Build or adapt a computer-vision model that can ingest live or recorded footage, detect predefined events and generate analytics dashboards or API outputs that slot neatly into existing systems. 
• Guide the full AI integration cycle—data collection, model training, validation, deployment and monitoring—so the solution stays accurate as conditions change. 
• Transfer knowledge to our internal team, including concise documentation and a hand-over session, ensuring we can maintain and scale the model independently.

Success means the video analytics run in real time (or near real time), maintain consistent accuracy on the agreed metrics and are stable enough for continuous plant use without manual babysitting.

If you have proven experience in computer vision, deep learning frameworks such as PyTorch or TensorFlow and a practical mindset for deploying models in industrial environments, your expertise will make an immediate impact.

full_description:
I want to build an automation-building tool that has artificial intelligence at its core and is tailored specifically to steel structures. The goal is to move repetitive, rules-based steps—everything from preliminary sizing through connection detailing—into a single application that learns from past projects and keeps improving its own recommendations.

Here’s the big picture of what I need:

• The AI layer must analyse inputs such as span, load combinations, regional code requirements and preferred member libraries, then generate an initial steel frame layout automatically. 
• Users should be able to override choices, and the system has to retrain itself on those corrections so the next project starts closer to the mark. 
• Code-checking and simple finite-element verification should happen in the background, flagging any members that do not meet strength or serviceability criteria. 
• A clean, modern interface (web or desktop) is essential for quick data entry and for exporting results to industry-standard formats like IFC, DWG or even a straight Bill of Materials CSV. 
• I prefer Python for the back end because of its strong AI libraries (TensorFlow / PyTorch), but I’m open to alternatives if you make a convincing case. 

Acceptance criteria 
1. A working prototype that can create a basic portal frame in structural steel, complete with sizing and code check, from only span, bay spacing, and load inputs. 
2. Evidence of learning: after manually adjusting at least five member sizes, the next generated frame should reproduce 60 % or more of those changes without intervention. 
3. Export files open correctly in Tekla Structures or equivalent BIM package without data loss.

If you have experience blending structural engineering logic with machine-learning workflows, let’s talk about how quickly we can move from concept to a usable MVP.

**About the Role**

Your primary objective will be to take our website to the **first page of Google UK** for our target keywords by implementing a comprehensive SEO strategy.

* Conduct a complete technical SEO audit.
* Refine and optimise the website structure, content, and metadata.
* Improve Core Web Vitals and overall website performance.

* Perform keyword research targeting the UK market.
* Optimise on-page and off-page SEO.
* Build high-quality, white-hat backlinks.
* Improve internal linking and site architecture.
* Implement structured data/schema markup.
* Monitor rankings and provide weekly progress reports.
* Drive targeted organic traffic that converts into enquiries and customers.

full_description:
This project centres on a metamaterial absorber that will operate between 2 GHz and 2.4 GHz for a telecommunications platform. I am using Rogers 4350B with a 1.524 mm thickness, so every simulation and layout must respect that specific substrate stack-up. The finished surface should maintain more than 92 % absorption across the entire band while remaining both angle and polarization insensitive; incidence from 0 ° up to 60 °—for TE and TM, normal as well as oblique—has to meet the same performance target.

Because the unit will be installed in a coastal environment, the design must tolerate sustained high humidity without performance drift. A manually adjustable feature is required; a simple, reliable way to trim or retune the absorber after fabrication (for example by replaceable lumped elements, screw-tuned posts, or similar low-complexity means) will satisfy this need as long as the adjustment range preserves the key specs.

Please base the work on full-wave EM simulation (CST Microwave Studio, HFSS, or an equivalent recognised tool) and provide: 
• 3-D model and project files for all simulations 
• S-parameter, absorption, and angular-sweep plots demonstrating the > 92 % target for both polarizations 
• Gerber or DXF layers ready for PCB manufacture, plus a concise fabrication note covering the humidity-resistant finish you recommend 
• A short tuning guide explaining the manual adjustment procedure and its expected effect on resonance

Testing or measurement plans are welcome if you have lab access, but validated simulation backed by clear documentation will be the primary acceptance criterion.

full_description:
I need a small but rock-solid tool that sits between several WhatsApp groups and my data stack. The goal is simple: as soon as a new post hits any of those groups, its text content and the poster’s contact information should flow straight into a live Google Sheet and, at the same moment, into my own CRM (an internally built system we call Base44).

Real-time speed is essential; a delay of more than a few seconds defeats the purpose. I am open to whichever technical route you prefer—WhatsApp Business API, a headless device bridge, or a clever hybrid—as long as it respects WhatsApp policies and stays resilient if numbers change or a session drops. AI or NLP components are welcome for cleaning the text, detecting language, and tagging key phrases before the data lands in the sheet and CRM.

Deliverables 
• A runnable script, micro-service, or lightweight app that captures group traffic 24/7 
• Live integration with Google Sheets (append-only, no overwriting) 
• Live push into Base44 via its REST endpoints (documentation supplied after award) 
• Basic NLP enrichment: remove emojis, normalise case, and tag the first three keywords per message 
• Setup guide and short Loom walkthrough so my team can redeploy it without you

Acceptance criteria 
1. New messages and contacts appear in Google Sheets and Base44 within ten seconds. 
2. No duplicate rows after 48 hours of continuous operation. 
3. Solution runs on a modest cloud VM (2 vCPU, 4 GB RAM) without manual babysitting.

If you have prior experience bridging WhatsApp with external systems, especially in real time, that will stand out. Let me know how you plan to tackle the WhatsApp session reliability issue and what libraries or frameworks you would lean on.
